ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., guard, forward, center) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach managing the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "logo_path" TEXT /* Path to the team's logo image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the coach's contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "team_id_home" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "team_id_away" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "score_home" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "score_away" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network broadcasting the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player injured */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date projected for player return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., active, healed) */,
  "injury_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "rehab_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of rehabilitation */,
  "rehab_end_date" TEXT /* End date of rehabilitation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the training session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in minutes */,
  "focus" TEXT /* Focus of the training session (e.g., shooting, defense) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team conducting the training */,
  "session_leader" TEXT /* Name of the session leader */,
  "assistant_coach" TEXT /* Name of the assistant coach */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game report */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of game performance and key highlights */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for future games based on analysis */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Numerical rating of the game performance */,
  "key_players" TEXT /* Key players who performed well */,
  "opponent_analysis" TEXT /* Analysis of the opponent's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reports_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics report */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being analyzed */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being analyzed */,
  "performance_summary" TEXT /* Summary of performance analytics */,
  "data_visualization" TEXT /* Path to the data visualization report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., player performance, team strategy) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for platform login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for platform login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID indicating the user's permissions */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team stat record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the team */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "points_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Average points allowed per game */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
